title: Tutorial
landingSubtitle: Full step-by-step documentation is hosted separately from this project.
landingDescription: Use the button below to open the complete Tutorial, including clone the template repo, make generate, make feature, localization, mock data, and real API setup.
landingHint: The documentation opens in a new browser tab on the template publisher's site.
devBannerDescription: This menu appears when you run make dev. Production builds (make build) never include it. Don't want it in dev either? Set VITE_SHOW_DEV_FEATURES=false in .env or .env.development.
